text.title: rag-eval-test-set-generation Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for rag-eval-test-set-generation as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using only factual, easy questions in the test set because they are the simplest to generate.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Easy questions mask retrieval failures. A system can score 0.90 faithfulness on factual lookups while completely failing multi-hop reasoning queries. The test set must stress all failure modes.

failure-mode.description: Regenerating the test set from scratch after each corpus update without reviewing changes.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Silent test set changes invalidate all metric comparisons. Always version the test set and diff it before re-running the evaluation suite.
